name: Blueberry Bread Machine Made
recipeIngredient: 16 ounces Frozen blueberries, thawed and drained
1/4 cup Retained juice, at room temperature
recipeInstructions: In order listed, add all dry ingredients into the bread machine pan. Add the berries with the dry ingredients. For a 1 1/2 lb loaf, my machine requires 300 cc of liquid at 90°F. Select thin top crust, then start the machine.
